en: Now after Jesus was born in Bethlehem of Judea in the days of Herod the king, behold, wise men from the east came to Jerusalem,
zh: 希律王執政的時候，耶穌生在猶太的伯利恆。那時，有幾個星象家 從東方來到耶路撒冷，

en: saying, "Where is he who has been born king of the Jews? For we saw his star when it rose and have come to worship him."
zh: 說：“那生下來作猶太人的王的在哪裡？我們看見他的星出現，特來朝拜他。”

en: When Herod the king heard this, he was troubled, and all Jerusalem with him;
zh: 希律王聽見了就心裡不安，全耶路撒冷的居民也是這樣。

en: and assembling all the chief priests and scribes of the people, he inquired of them where the Christ was to be born.
zh: 他就召集所有的祭司長和民間的經學家，問他們基督應該生在哪裡。

en: They told him, "In Bethlehem of Judea, for so it is written by the prophet:
zh: 他們回答：“在猶太的伯利恆。因為有先知在經上這樣說：

en: "' And you, O Bethlehem, in the land of Judah, are by no means least among the rulers of Judah; for from you shall come a ruler who will shepherd my people Israel.'"
zh: ‘猶大地的伯利恆啊！ 你在猶大的領袖中，並不是最小的， 因為必有一位領袖從你那裡出來， 牧養我的子民以色列。’”

en: Then Herod summoned the wise men secretly and ascertained from them what time the star had appeared.
zh: 希律暗中把星象家召來，仔細查問他們，那顆星甚麼時候出現，

en: And he sent them to Bethlehem, saying, "Go and search diligently for the child, and when you have found him, bring me word, that I too may come and worship him."
zh: 然後派他們到伯利恆去，說：“你們去細心尋訪那小孩，找到了就向我報告，好叫我也去拜他。”

en: After listening to the king, they went on their way. And behold, the star that they had seen when it rose went before them until it came to rest over the place where the child was.
zh: 他們聽命去了。他們在東方看見的那顆星，忽然在他們前頭，領他們到那小孩所在的地方，就在上頭停住了。

en: When they saw the star, they rejoiced exceedingly with great joy.
zh: 他們看見那顆星，歡喜極了；

en: And going into the house they saw the child with Mary his mother, and they fell down and worshiped him. Then, opening their treasures, they offered him gifts, gold and frankincense and myrrh.
zh: 進了房子，看見小孩和他母親馬利亞，就俯伏拜他，並且打開寶盒，把黃金、乳香、沒藥作禮物獻給他。

en: And being warned in a dream not to return to Herod, they departed to their own country by another way.
zh: 後來他們在夢中得著指示不要回到希律那裡去，就從別的路回鄉去了。

en: Now when they had departed, behold, an angel of the Lord appeared to Joseph in a dream and said, "Rise, take the child and his mother, and flee to Egypt, and remain there until I tell you, for Herod is about to search for the child, to destroy him."
zh: 他們走了以後，主的使者在夢中向約瑟顯現，說：“起來，帶著孩子和他母親逃到埃及去，留在那裡，直到我再指示你，因為希律要尋找這孩子，把他殺掉。”

en: And he rose and took the child and his mother by night and departed to Egypt
zh: 約瑟就起來，連夜帶著孩子和他母親往埃及去，

en: and remained there until the death of Herod. This was to fulfill what the Lord had spoken by the prophet, "Out of Egypt I called my son."
zh: 住在那裡，直到希律死了，為的是要應驗主藉先知所說的：“我從埃及召我的兒子出來。”

en: Then Herod, when he saw that he had been tricked by the wise men, became furious, and he sent and killed all the male children in Bethlehem and in all that region who were two years old or under, according to the time that he had ascertained from the wise men.
zh: 希律見自己被星象家愚弄了，就大怒，於是照著他從星象家所問得的日子，下令把伯利恆和附近地方，兩歲及以下的小孩全都殺死。

en: Then was fulfilled what was spoken by the prophet Jeremiah:
zh: 這就應驗了耶利米先知所說的：

en: "A voice was heard in Ramah, weeping and loud lamentation, Rachel weeping for her children; she refused to be comforted, because they are no more."
zh: “在拉瑪聽見有聲音， 是痛哭、極大哀號的聲音； 拉結為她的兒女哀哭， 不肯受安慰，因為他們都不在了。”

en: But when Herod died, behold, an angel of the Lord appeared in a dream to Joseph in Egypt,
zh: 希律死後，在埃及，主的使者在夢中向約瑟顯現，

en: saying, "Rise, take the child and his mother and go to the land of Israel, for those who sought the child's life are dead."
zh: 說：“那些要殺害這孩子的人已經死了。起來，帶著孩子和他母親回以色列地去吧。”

en: And he rose and took the child and his mother and went to the land of Israel.
zh: 約瑟就起來，帶著小孩子和他母親回到以色列地。

en: But when he heard that Archelaus was reigning over Judea in place of his father Herod, he was afraid to go there, and being warned in a dream he withdrew to the district of Galilee.
zh: 只是聽見亞基老接續他父親希律作了猶太王，他就不敢到猶太地去；又在夢中得了指示，於是往加利利境去，

en: And he went and lived in a city called Nazareth, that what was spoken by the prophets might be fulfilled: "He shall be called a Nazarene."
zh: 來到拿撒勒城住下，這樣就應驗了先知所說的：“他必稱為拿撒勒人。”
